# PA-HP
## Virulence pathway
```{r}
rm(list=ls())
library(patchwork)
library(dplyr)

# 1. data load
deg_list <- read.csv("/Users/lubeifang/Desktop/PA_HP/files/HP_deg_list.csv")
deg_count <-  data.frame(table(deg_list$mu_name))
colnames(deg_count) <- c("mu_name", "deg_count")
  
virus <- read.csv("/Users/lubeifang/Desktop/PA_HP/files/PA_pathway.csv")
unique(virus$Product)
virus_len <- data.frame(table(virus$Pathway))
colnames(virus_len) <- c("Pathway", "pathway_total")

p1<-ggplot(virus_len,aes(x=Var1,y=Freq,fill=Var1)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "none") +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette=9)+
  geom_text(aes(label = Freq), hjust = -0.3, size = 3)+
  coord_flip() +
  xlab("Pathway")
# ggsave("/Users/lubeifang/Desktop/PA_HP/Figures/F2_vir/virus_pathway_bar.pdf", width = 6, height = 4)
# deg_list$Gene.Name <- case_when(
#         deg_list$Row.names == "PA2840" ~ "deaD",
#         deg_list$Row.names == "PA0095" ~ "vgrG1b",
#         deg_list$Row.names == "PA1441" ~ "fliK",
#         deg_list$Row.names == "PA0797" ~ "pmiR",
#         deg_list$Row.names == "PA2588" ~ "cdpR",
#         TRUE ~ deg_list$Gene.Name)

deg_list$symbol <- ifelse(deg_list$Gene.Name=="",deg_list$Row.names,deg_list$Gene.Name)



# 2. calculate intersedtion gene in each pathway (k)
viru_list <- merge(deg_list,virus,by.x="symbol",by.y="Product")
viru_count <- aggregate(Row.names ~ mu_name + Pathway, viru_list, FUN = length)
```

# hypergeometric distribution test
```{r}
# 3. All counts needed to integrate the four-cell table
count_matrix <- viru_count %>%
  rename(overlap_count = Row.names) %>%
  left_join(deg_count, by = "mu_name") %>%
  left_join(virus_len, by = "Pathway")
N_genome_background <- 4012

# 4. Run the hypergeometric distribution test (to calculate the true p-value).
stat_results <- count_matrix %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    true_p_value = phyper(overlap_count - 1, 
                          pathway_total, 
                          N_genome_background - pathway_total, 
                          deg_count, 
                          lower.tail = FALSE)
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  # FDR was obtained by performing multiple hypothesis testing and correction.
  mutate(p_adj = p.adjust(true_p_value, method = "BH"))


# 5. HPs that significantly mediate virulence pathways
signif_threshold <- 0.05
data_with_signif <- stat_results %>%
  mutate(
    is_significant = ifelse(true_p_value < signif_threshold, TRUE, FALSE),
    ratio = overlap_count / pathway_total
  ) %>%
  group_by(Pathway) %>%
  mutate(
    is_top5 = is_significant & (rank(-ratio, ties.method = "first") <= 5),
    label = ifelse(is_top5, mu_name, NA)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

final_hp_count <- length(unique(data_with_signif$mu_name[data_with_signif$is_significant]))
write.csv(data_with_signif, "/Users/lubeifang/Desktop/HPinViru_path_with_hypergeometric.csv", row.names = FALSE)


ggplot(data_with_signif, aes(x = Pathway, y = -log10(true_p_value), fill = Pathway)) +
  geom_violin(color = NA, width = 0.8, alpha = 0.3) +
  geom_jitter(aes(color = is_significant), width = 0.2, size = 2, alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(signif_threshold), linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
  geom_violin(color = NA,width=1.5) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("TRUE" = "#D55E00", "FALSE" = "grey70")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = MetBrewer::met.brewer("Morgenstern", 7)) +
  geom_text_repel(aes(label = label), size = 3, max.overlaps = 20,min.segment.length = 0) +
  coord_flip() +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(y = "-log10 (Empirical P-value)", x = "Virulence Pathway") +
  theme(panel.grid.major = element_blank(), panel.grid.minor = element_blank(), legend.position = "none")
ggsave("/Users/lubeifang/Desktop/HPinPathway_violin.pdf", width = 8, height = 6)



num <- as.data.frame(table(data_with_signif$Pathway[data_with_signif$is_significant & data_with_signif$ratio > 0.2]))

length(unique(data_with_signif$mu_name[data_with_signif$is_significant & data_with_signif$ratio > 0.2]))


data_with_tail <- read.csv("/Users/lubeifang/Desktop/PA_HP/Publication/NCrevision260305/rebuttal_figure/HPinViru_path_with_tail.csv")
length(unique(data_with_tail$mu_name[data_with_tail$is_right_tail]))
test <- merge(data_with_signif, data_with_tail, by = c("mu_name", "Pathway"), all.x = TRUE) %>%
  filter

```


# Log-normal 
```{r}
count <- count_matrix %>%
  mutate(p = overlap_count / pathway_total) 

results <- count %>%
  group_by(Pathway) %>%
  summarise(
    meanlog_p = mean(log(p)),  
    sdlog_p = sd(log(p)),     
    right_tail_cutoff = qlnorm(0.95, meanlog = mean(log(p)), sdlog = sd(log(p))) # 95%分位数
  )

curve_data <- count %>%
  group_by(Pathway) %>%
  summarise(
    meanlog_p = mean(log(p)),
    sdlog_p = sd(log(p))
  ) %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    x = list(seq(min(count$p) + 1e-6, max(count$p), length.out = 100)),
    y = list(dlnorm(x, meanlog = meanlog_p, sdlog = sdlog_p))  # Log-normal密度
  ) %>%
  unnest(cols = c(x, y))

# 拟合曲线图
ggplot(count, aes(x = p)) +
  geom_density(aes(fill = Pathway), alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_line(data = curve_data, aes(x = x, y = y, color = Pathway), size = 1) +
  geom_vline(data = results, aes(xintercept = exp(meanlog_p), color = Pathway), 
             linetype = "dashed") +
  facet_wrap(~Pathway, scales = "free") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "Fitted Log-Normal Distribution for Each Pathway",
    x = "p (Ratio)",
    y = "Density"
  ) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")
# ggsave("/Users/lubeifang/Desktop/PA_HP/Figures/F2_vir/Pathway_lognorm.pdf", width = 8, height = 6)

# right tail
data_with_tail <- count %>%
  left_join(results, by = "Pathway") %>%
  mutate(
    is_right_tail = ifelse(p > right_tail_cutoff, TRUE, FALSE),
    label = ifelse(is_right_tail, mu_name, NA)
  )

# write.csv(data_with_tail, "/Users/lubeifang/Desktop/HPinViru_path_with_tail.csv", row.names = FALSE)
table(data_with_tail$is_right_tail)

# Violin图
ggplot(data_with_tail,aes(x=Pathway,y=p,fill=Pathway)) +
  geom_point(position = position_jitter(width = 0.2),size = 2, color = ifelse(data_with_tail$is_right_tail, "pink", NA), alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_violin(color = NA,width=1.5) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "none") +
  geom_text_repel(data = count, aes(label = label), 
                   size = 3, 
                   box.padding = 0.35, 
                   point.padding = 0.5,
                   segment.color = 'grey50',
                    min.segment.length = 0) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = MetBrewer::met.brewer("Morgenstern", 7)) +
  coord_flip() 

```


# final results
```{r}
results <- merge(data_with_signif, data_with_tail, by = c("mu_name", "Pathway"), all.x = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(is_show = ifelse(is_significant == TRUE & is_right_tail == TRUE, TRUE, FALSE))
write.csv(results, "/Users/lubeifang/Desktop/HPinViru_path_final_results.csv", row.names = FALSE)

ggplot(results, aes(x = Pathway, y = -log10(true_p_value), fill = Pathway)) +
  geom_jitter(aes(color = is_show, size =  -log10(true_p_value)), width = 0.2, alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(signif_threshold), linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
  geom_violin(color = NA,width=1.5) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("TRUE" = "#D55E00", "FALSE" = "grey70")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = MetBrewer::met.brewer("Morgenstern", 7)) +
  geom_text_repel(aes(label = label.x), size = 3, max.overlaps = 20,min.segment.length = 0) +
  coord_flip() +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(y = "-log10 (Empirical P-value)", x = "Virulence Pathway") +
  theme(panel.grid.major = element_blank(), panel.grid.minor = element_blank(), legend.position = "none")
ggsave("/Users/lubeifang/Desktop/HPinPathway_violin.pdf", width = 8, height = 6)



num <- as.data.frame(table(results$Pathway[results$is_significant & results$is_right_tail]))
length(unique(results$mu_name[results$is_significant & results$is_right_tail]))

num <- as.data.frame(table(results$Pathway[results$is_right_tail]))
length(unique(results$mu_name[results$is_right_tail]))


ggplot(num,aes(x=Var1,y=Freq,fill=Var1)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "none") +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette=2)+
  geom_text(aes(label = Freq), vjust = -0.3, size = 3)+
  xlab("")
# ggsave("/Users/lubeifang/Desktop/PA_HP/Figures/F2_vir/HPinPathway_p0,3.pdf",width = 3, height = 4)
```

## virulence network
```{r}
top3 <- results %>%
  filter(is_significant) %>%
  group_by(Pathway) %>%
  arrange(desc(ratio), .by_group = TRUE) %>% 
  mutate(label_new = ifelse(is_right_tail & row_number() <= 3, mu_name, NA)) %>% 
  filter(!is.na(label_new)) 

top3_list <- viru_list %>%
  subset(viru_list$mu_name %in% unique(top3$mu_name)) %>%
  subset(log2FoldChange > 2 | log2FoldChange < -2)
length(unique(top3_list$mu_name))
length(unique(top3_list$symbol))
write.csv(top3_list,"/Users/lubeifang/Desktop/viru_net.csv",row.names = F,quote = F)
```

##select All-round and specialized MU
```{r}
## Regulate all pathway
allround <- results %>%
  filter(is_show) %>%
  group_by(mu_name) %>%
  summarise(pathway_count = sum(is_significant)) %>%
  filter(pathway_count >= 2)


## Regulate only one pathway
specialized <- data_with_signif %>%
  filter(is_significant) %>%
  group_by(mu_name) %>%
  mutate(ratio = overlap_count/pathway_total) %>%
  filter(ratio > 0.4)
unique(specialized$mu_name)
```

## pie plot
```{r}
library(ggradar)
unique(top3$mu_name)
top3_pie <- data_with_signif %>%
  subset(data_with_signif$mu_name %in% unique(top3$mu_name)) 


for (i in  unique(top3$mu_name)) {
  df <- data.frame(name = i,
                   as.data.frame(t(top3_pie[top3_pie$mu_name == i,][,c(2,6)])))
  colnames(df) <- df[c(1),]
  df <- df[c(2),]
  df[,c(2:ncol(df))] <- as.numeric(df[,c(2:ncol(df))] )
  
  ggradar(df,
          background.circle.colour = NA,
          axis.line.colour = "gray60",
          gridline.min.colour = "gray60",
          gridline.mid.colour = "gray60",
          gridline.max.colour = "gray60",
          group.line.width = 0.5,
          group.point.size = 0.1,
          grid.min = 0,
          grid.mid = 0.4,
          grid.max = 0.8,
          label.gridline.min = F,
          label.gridline.mid = F,
          label.gridline.max = F,
          fill = T,
          legend.position = "bottom",
          plot.title = i)
  ggsave(paste0("/Users/lubeifang/Desktop/PA_HP/Figures/F2_vir/pie/",i,".pdf"), width = 3, height = 3)
}


unique(specialized$mu_name)
special_pie <- count %>%
  subset(count$mu_name %in% unique(specialized$mu_name)) 
for (i in  unique(specialized$mu_name)) {
  df <- data.frame(name = i,
                   as.data.frame(t(special_pie[special_pie$mu_name == i,][,c(1,6)])))
  colnames(df) <- df[c(1),]
  df <- df[c(2),]
  df[,c(2:ncol(df))] <- as.numeric(df[,c(2:ncol(df))] )
  
  ggradar(df,
          background.circle.colour = NA,
          axis.line.colour = "gray60",
          gridline.min.colour = "gray60",
          gridline.mid.colour = "gray60",
          gridline.max.colour = "gray60",
          group.line.width = 0.5,
          group.point.size = 0.1,
          grid.min = 0,
          grid.mid = 0.4,
          grid.max = 0.8,
          label.gridline.min = F,
          label.gridline.mid = F,
          label.gridline.max = F,
          fill = T,
          legend.position = "bottom",
          title = i) 
  ggsave(paste0("/Users/lubeifang/Desktop/PA_HP/Figures/F2_vir/pie/",i,".pdf"), width = 3, height = 3)
}

```


## upset
```{r}
count <- results %>%
  subset(is_show == TRUE)
unique(count$Pathway)
x <- list(EPS_Biofilm = count[count$Pathway=="EPS_Biofilm",]$mu_name,
          MIC= count[count$Pathway=="MIC",]$mu_name,
          motility = count[count$Pathway=="motility",]$mu_name,
          T3SS = count[count$Pathway=="T3SS",]$mu_name,
          T6SS = count[count$Pathway=="T6SS",]$mu_name,
          PYO = count[count$Pathway=="PYO",]$mu_name,
          QS = count[count$Pathway=="QS",]$mu_name)
library(UpSetR)
pdf("/Users/lubeifang/Desktop/UpSetR_pathway.pdf", width = 6, height = 4)
upset(
  fromList(x), 
  order.by = "freq",         
  nsets = 7,               
  nintersects = 10,        
  main.bar.color = "lightblue", 
  sets.bar.color = "skyblue",
  matrix.color = "lightblue3",
  shade.color = "lightblue4",     
  sets.x.label = "Gene count",   
  mainbar.y.label = "Intersection Size", 
  keep.order = TRUE,
  mb.ratio =  c(0.6,0.4)     
)
dev.off()
```
